negated_statement: Not all students who study hard fail the exam.
option_a: Some students who study hard pass the exam.
option_b: All students who study hard pass the exam.

negated_statement: It is not the case that no birds can fly.
option_b: At least one bird can fly.

negated_statement: The system does not always return incorrect results.
option_a: The system sometimes returns correct results.

option_b: Some people who voted for the policy were unaware of its consequences.
